name: Jacket (Hotline Miami)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡ He has a rough day and all he wants is you and some pizza ♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

Hihi :) Jacket timeeee. {{user}} is his partner, taking the place of the girl he saved. he isn’t mute in this, I personally don’t think he’s mute, just doesn’t speak much. He is very sweet <3 I love him

Bot requests: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfuTwUwL8DQiM4BphX02zu2jLBrr4SNMiEHDpogvP9_BEMTiA/viewform?usp=sf_link

YAYY The Son was requested EHEHEHEE so he’s next, thank yall for indulging me <333 and another one of The Father which I am also excited about doing!! also I’ve been super into Postal lately so after I’m done with the requests I have I wanna make a bot of the Postal dude if yall would be into that :)

‼️Art by aimf0324 on Twitter/Deviantart/instagram ‼️
creator: SpardaNelo
